tuning: E A D G B E
content:
-------------------------------------------------------------------------
SUDDENLY – Billy Ocean
-------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tabbed by: Kengus

What can you say - they don't make 'em like this any more... This must be
one of the cheesiest, corniest songs from the 80s, but what the hey. It
deserves to be posted. Try it out.

Standard tuning               [ch]Am[/ch] = x02210    [ch]Dm7[/ch] = xx0211       [ch]A[/ch] = x02220
Capo on first fret!        [ch]Am7/G[/ch] = 302010      [ch]C[/ch] = x32010   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] = x32000
                           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] = 133210  [ch]Esus4[/ch] = 022200   [ch]Asus2[/ch] = x02200
[INTRO]                        [ch]G[/ch] = 320033     [ch]E7[/ch] = 020100  [ch]E7sus4[/ch] = 057700
[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am7/G[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  x2                                       [ch]E7[/ch]* = 056700


[VERSE 1]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Am7/G[/ch]               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]             [ch]C/E[/ch]
    I used to think that love was just a fairytale[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Esus4[/ch]      [ch]E7[/ch]
    Until that first hello,  until that first smile[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Am7/G[/ch]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C/E[/ch]
    But if I had to do it all again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                                   [ch]Esus4[/ch]              [ch]E7[/ch]
    I wouldn’t change a thing, ‘cause this love is everlasting[/tab]


[CHORUS]

[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Suddenly,   life has new meaning to me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
There's beauty up above, and things we never take notice of[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Esus4[/ch]              [ch]E7[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]...
You wake up, and suddenly, you’re in love[/tab]


[INTERLUDE]

[tab]... [ch]Am7/G[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am7/G[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
                    ooh yeah           girl[/tab]


[VERSE 2]

[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Am7/G[/ch]                [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C/E[/ch]
You’re everything a man could want and more[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch]
    One thousand words are not enough to say what I feel inside[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Am7/G[/ch]             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C/E[/ch]
   Holding hands as we walk along the shore[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm7[/ch]                             [ch]Esus4[/ch]            [ch]E7[/ch]
Never felt like this before, now you’re all I’m living for[/tab]


[CHORUS]

[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Suddenly,   life has new meaning to me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
There's beauty up above, and things we never take notice of[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Esus4[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
You wake up, and suddenly, you’re in love[/tab]


[BRIDGE]

[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]          [ch]C/E[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]               [ch]C/E[/ch]     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
      Each day,    I pray, this love affair would last forever,    oh hoh[/tab]


[CHORUS]

[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Suddenly, life has new meaning to me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
There's beauty up above, and things we never take notice of[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Esus4[/ch]          [ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]...
You wake up, suddenly you’re in love[/tab]


[INTERLUDE]

...[ch]Am7/G[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am7/G[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  


[OUTRO]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
           Ooh, there's beauty up above, things we never take notice of[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch]             [ch]E7[/ch]*               [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am7/G[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
You wake up, and suddenly, you’re in love,         ooooh     ooooh.[/tab]
